title: Dealix Vendor
description: Single source of truth for a Dealix vendor (SaaS, API, infrastructure, service provider).

vendor_id.description: Unique vendor id (snake_case, prefixed with v_).

purpose.description: What Dealix uses this vendor for.

monthly_cost_sar_estimate.description: Estimated monthly cost in SAR (null if usage-based or unknown).

monthly_cost_sar_actual.description: Actual monthly cost in SAR (null if not yet billed).

data_risk.description: Highest data classification handled by this vendor.

data_risk_reason.description: Why the data_risk is what it is.

secrets_required.description: Env-var names this vendor needs in Dealix (no values; only names).

cancellation_difficulty.description: How hard it is to cancel the contract.

business_criticality.description: How critical this vendor is to revenue or operations.

soc2_certified.description: Whether the vendor has SOC 2 certification.
